message:
Remove unused imports from annotation pipeline scripts

Clean up unused Python imports across four annotation scripts:
- annotate_domains.py: removed unused import
- fetch_kegg.py: removed unused import
- host_trna_data.py: removed unused import
- run_pipeline.py: removed unused imports, minor cleanup

No functional changes; all removed symbols were unreferenced.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -10,7 +10,6 @@
 """
 
 import argparse
-import json
 import sqlite3
 import time
 from pathlib import Path

@@ -11,7 +11,6 @@
 
 import argparse
 import json
-import re
 import sqlite3
 import time
 from pathlib import Path

@@ -10,7 +10,6 @@
 """
 
 import argparse
-import json
 import sqlite3
 import time
 from pathlib import Path

@@ -31,7 +31,7 @@ def run_step(name: str, cmd: list[str], skip: bool = False):
     print(f"{'='*60}\n")
 
     try:
-        result = subprocess.run(cmd, check=True)
+        subprocess.run(cmd, check=True)
         print(f"\n✅ {name} completed successfully")
         return True
     except subprocess.CalledProcessError as e:
@@ -202,7 +202,7 @@ def main():
         print(f"Error: Database not found: {db_path}")
         return 1
 
-    print(f"🧬 Phage Annotation Pipeline")
+    print("🧬 Phage Annotation Pipeline")
     print(f"   Database: {db_path}")
     print(f"   Script dir: {script_dir}")
